title: ayenia tortilis
intro: Ayenia tortilis is a species of flowering plant in the family Malpighiaceae, commonly known as the 'shrubby ayenia' due to its compact and shrub-like appearance. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine, particularly in Latin America, for its medicinal properties. The extracts of Ayenia tortilis have been found to have antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can provide health benefits such as wound healing, pain relief, and protection against oxidative stress. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves and stems can be used to make herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and ointments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
